subcodes.first_line: O ye divine lovers! This century is the century of the Blessed Beauty, and this age is distinguished among all ages by the dawning of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی این قرن قرن جمال مبارک است و این عهد از اعصار شمس حقیقت طلوعی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
